name: orbit-lifecycle-system
description: Lifecycle marketing operating system for Claude with guided discovery, auto-created ~/Orbit workspace, reusable email components, Figma import, and Braze-ready publishing.
long_description: Orbit gives Claude a local lifecycle marketing operating system. It routes requests to the right Orbit protocol, exposes the full skill library as resources, loads a canonical skill manifest for routing and validation, creates and maintains a local ~/Orbit workspace automatically on first run without requiring folder setup, runs a step-by-step brand-guidelines intake before drafting brand kits with brand-profile.json plus brand-guidelines.md, runs a discovery-first workflow for journeys, programs, and campaigns so Orbit grounds the work in objectives, KPIs, audience context, connected data sources, and execution constraints before building flows, validates local setup and brand kits, imports Figma email designs and PDF references, infers reusable email components with a controlled taxonomy plus reusable props-and-slots contracts, generates component-first MJML lifecycle emails with HTML previews and QA, saves reusable templates, components, and programs into a local library, syncs Braze Content Blocks and HTML email templates via API, packages Braze-ready implementation bundles, and exports Notion-friendly documentation.

company_name.title: Company Name
company_name.description: Optional default company or brand name used in Orbit outputs.

default_platform.title: Default Platform
default_platform.description: Optional default lifecycle platform, such as braze, iterable, or hubspot.

default_geography.title: Default Geography
default_geography.description: Optional default geography or market for compliance-aware recommendations.

google_ai_api_key.title: Google AI API Key
google_ai_api_key.description: Optional Google AI Studio key used for Nano Banana Pro image generation.

figma_api_token.title: Figma API Token
figma_api_token.description: Optional token used to import structured email designs from Figma.

braze_api_key.title: Braze API Key
braze_api_key.description: Optional Braze REST API key used to publish Content Blocks and HTML email templates.

braze_rest_endpoint.title: Braze REST Endpoint
braze_rest_endpoint.description: Optional Braze REST API endpoint, for example https://rest.iad-01.braze.com.

tools.name: orbit_list_skills
tools.description: List the Orbit skills by category or surface the whole library.

tools.name: orbit_route_task
tools.description: Rank the best-fit Orbit skills for a request and identify the missing disambiguators.

tools.name: orbit_load_skill
tools.description: Load an Orbit skill in summary or full mode.

tools.name: orbit_get_template
tools.description: Fetch a reusable Orbit template or output format.

tools.name: orbit_compose_sequence
tools.description: Suggest a multi-skill Orbit workflow for a goal.

tools.name: orbit_validate_output
tools.description: Run a structural validation pass on a draft against an Orbit skill.

tools.name: orbit_check_setup
tools.description: Run an Orbit healthcheck for config, output paths, brand kits, and image-generation readiness.

tools.name: orbit_bootstrap_home_workspace
tools.description: Create Orbit's default ~/Orbit workspace and fill in any missing starter folders or files.

tools.name: orbit_check_copy_readiness
tools.description: Use this before writing copy. If brand guidelines or Tone Of Voice are missing, Orbit should ask whether to set them up first or proceed with explicit assumptions and remember that choice.

tools.name: orbit_start_program_discovery
tools.description: Use this first when the user asks Orbit to create a journey, program, or campaign. It returns a required intake survey for objectives, KPIs, audience, current state, connected data, and build constraints before Orbit drafts the flow. On the first pass, Orbit should present the survey directly to the user rather than pre-populating discovery answers unless the user explicitly asks for that.

tools.name: orbit_validate_brand_kit
tools.description: Validate brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, logo paths, example assets, and preferred layout settings.

tools.name: orbit_start_brand_guidelines_intake
tools.description: Use this first whenever a user asks Orbit to create brand guidelines or a brand kit. It runs a required step-by-step intake and returns only the next questions to ask.

tools.name: orbit_build_brand_kit_draft
tools.description: Create a reviewable brand-kit draft with brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, and a normalized asset plan after the guided intake is complete.

tools.name: orbit_write_brand_kit
tools.description: Write an approved brand-kit draft to disk and copy normalized logo/example assets into the standard folder structure.

tools.name: orbit_update_brand_guidelines
tools.description: Update draft or existing brand-guidelines.md content without a full brand-kit re-intake.

tools.name: orbit_build_lifecycle_diagram_spec
tools.description: Create a canonical lifecycle diagram spec with nodes, edges, platform badges, and Mermaid output.

tools.name: orbit_update_lifecycle_diagram_spec
tools.description: Apply deterministic revisions to an existing lifecycle diagram spec.

tools.name: orbit_render_lifecycle_diagram
tools.description: Render a lifecycle diagram spec to SVG, PNG, and PDF.

tools.name: orbit_build_brand_header_spec
tools.description: Create a review-ready brand header spec with deterministic layout and Nano Banana Pro art prompting.

tools.name: orbit_update_brand_header_spec
tools.description: Apply deterministic revisions to an existing brand header spec.

tools.name: orbit_render_brand_header
tools.description: Render a brand header spec into SVG, PNG, and PDF assets with local logo composition.

tools.name: orbit_build_program_workspace
tools.description: Create a file-backed Orbit workspace tying together brief, message plan, lifecycle diagram, and downstream production artifacts.

tools.name: orbit_import_figma_email_design
tools.description: Import a Figma email design into Orbit as a structured design record.

tools.name: orbit_import_pdf_email_reference
tools.description: Import a PDF as a lower-confidence reference-mode design source.

tools.name: orbit_suggest_email_component_map
tools.description: Infer reusable email components from a design import and map them to Orbit's canonical taxonomy.

tools.name: orbit_update_email_component_map
tools.description: Apply deterministic revisions to an inferred email component map.

tools.name: orbit_approve_email_component_map
tools.description: Approve an email component map before code generation or Braze publishing.

tools.name: orbit_build_message_plan
tools.description: Create a channel-by-channel message inventory with dependencies, personalization needs, and CTA mapping.

tools.name: orbit_build_email_template_spec
tools.description: Create a canonical Orbit email template spec before code generation.

tools.name: orbit_generate_mjml_template
tools.description: Generate canonical MJML from an approved Orbit email template spec.

tools.name: orbit_compile_email_template
tools.description: Compile Orbit MJML to HTML and plain text with a compile report.

tools.name: orbit_preview_email_template
tools.description: Create desktop, mobile, and dark-mode preview HTML files for an Orbit email.

tools.name: orbit_validate_email_template
tools.description: Run Orbit email QA for markup, links, fallback logic, legal blocks, and Braze-safe structure.

tools.name: orbit_generate_email_components
tools.description: Generate reusable MJML/HTML email components from an approved component map.

tools.name: orbit_assemble_email_template_from_components
tools.description: Assemble a final MJML/HTML email from approved reusable Orbit components.

tools.name: orbit_sync_braze_content_blocks
tools.description: Publish reusable Orbit email components to Braze Content Blocks.

tools.name: orbit_sync_braze_email_template
tools.description: Publish a compiled Orbit HTML email template to Braze.

tools.name: orbit_publish_email_to_braze
tools.description: Sync Braze Content Blocks first, then publish the final Braze HTML email template.

tools.name: orbit_build_braze_pack
tools.description: Package Orbit production artifacts into a Braze-ready implementation bundle.

tools.name: orbit_export_notion_bundle
tools.description: Create a Notion-friendly Markdown bundle with lifecycle docs and artifact references.

tools.name: orbit_save_library_item
tools.description: Save an email template, email component, module, or program artifact into Orbit's local library.

tools.name: orbit_list_library_items
tools.description: Search or browse Orbit's local template, component, module, and program library.

tools.name: orbit_load_library_item
tools.description: Load a saved Orbit library item with its artifact payload and saved files.

tools.name: orbit_update_library_item
tools.description: Update metadata for a saved Orbit library item.
